---
title: "Cyril Hammond Elgie, later Elgee"
---

## Cyril Hammond Elgie, later Elgee

**Dates:** (18 October 1871-17 August 1917)

### Description

eldest son of the Rev. W. F. Elgie

### Biography

He left Lancing 1889, and resigned his commission in 1904. He was a colonial administrator for twenty years.  [<i>Lancing Register</i>;  tablet in Otterbourne Church]

### Letters

- Letter from [late 1870s]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
